Group.Name: Hokuto Force
Group.Slogan: We give dignity even to the lamest games !!
The fist of the north star !!
Save 'em from the dust of time!!
The power of the seven stars !!
We don't whine... we do facts !!

Handle.HandleStory: I was a huge fan of the Dragonlance books.

Scener.Trivia:
Pre-scene, Raistlin was a prolific POKEster (ZZAP!, Commodore User, CCI, What Poke and many more).
Joined the demo scene in 1988 with his brother, Kreator (<scener id=7835>), creating SCC (Silsden Cracking Crew) .. soon after joined Pyrotech and, later, co-formed Excess.
Joined Genesis Project (G*P) - which became his proper "home" - after short stints in a few other groups.
Quit the scene in 1991, after Delirious 10, to focus on University studies.
27 years later, in 2018, he rejoined G*P and released Delirious 11 at Gubbdata 2018 - which took 2nd place. Later that year, with just a 3-month development window, released X Marks the Spot at X2018 (which took 4th place).
Raistlin has been in the games industry since 1994 and has worked on many games - Destruction Derby, the Test Drive series, LA Rush, Wheelman, Infinity Blade, the Gears of War series, Fortnite, Lawbreakers, Conan Exiles, Sea of Thieves and more... as well as working on Unreal Engine.
Moved to Thailand in 2021.
Created several C64 related websites:-
https://c64demo.com : a coding blog https://c64gfx.com : a site collecting C64 artworks https://sidquake.c64demo.com : a tool for easy packaging of SIDs as executables with visualiser, scroller etc https://dirquake.c64demo.com : a tool - mostly for C64GFX.com - to quickly grab screenshots of C64 DIR art

Handle.HandleStory: Originally created as an alter-ego when submitting POKEs to Zzap!64.

I am a music composer/producer from Greece. Commodore 64 user/lover since the early-mid 80s. SID music was and still is fascinating/kinda addicting to me and I always wanted to be a part of it and contribute to the scene with my own SID music and also my pixel art and PETSCII creations. I never thought as a child that one day I will be testing/listening to my own SID files on my childhood C64 but here we are!
https://www.youtube.com/@DJSpaceRetrotunes https://www.facebook.com/djspace.music http://www.retroperks.com
Inspired by german comedian and actor [url=http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Dieter_Hallervorden]Dieter "Didi" Hallervorden[/url] which I considered quite funny in my teenage days.

Scener.Trivia: Took a long scene break from January 2002 until October 2011.

Handle.HandleStory: Uncle Fritz (german: Onkel Fritz) was a strange person mentioned in some very poor german jokes in the past.

UserComment.Text: Stinsen's is a great cover, too. But I love the dynanic and power of this one. Different approach IMO. Re-listened to the original by Journey for comparison. ;-)

Handle.HandleStory: Name of the main character of the anime "SF Saiyuki Starzinger" by Leiji Matsumoto. At least here in italy, since in japanese is written Jan Kugo. I've chosen the handle "IAN" to sign my high scores on arcade games ^_^, then changed to Ian7102 in the late 80's, and finally iAN CooG from 1999 or so.

UserComment.Text: let's hear how it compares to https://csdb.dk/release/?id=116481
Great cover of one of my favourite songs! <3
